tests.summary: Product Listing: default listing loads all products
tests.precondition: User is on the Home page (`/`) with no filters, search, or category selected; price slider at full range.

steps.expectedResult: All 8 [data-test=product-card] elements render, matching the full catalog in constants.ts.

steps.action: Inspect the filter controls: [data-test=search-query], [data-test=sort], [data-test=price-slider], and each [data-test=category-*] button.
steps.expectedResult: Search box is empty, no category is selected/highlighted, price slider covers min-max, sort is at its default.

tests.summary: Product Listing: filter by single category
tests.precondition: Home page loaded with all products visible, no filters applied.

steps.expectedResult: Only the 4 Hand Tools products are shown: Combination Pliers, Bolt Cutters, Claw Hammer, Slip Joint Pliers.
No product from another category (e.g. Thor Hammer, Safety Goggles, Sledgehammer, Tape Measure) is visible.

tests.summary: Product Listing: filter by category with no matches
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.expectedResult: Only "Thor Hammer" ($109.99, the sole Novelty product) is shown.

steps.action: Drag the upper handle of [data-test=price-slider] down to $50.
steps.expectedResult: Zero [data-test=product-card] elements render; an empty/no-results state is shown, no console error.

tests.summary: Product Listing: search by exact product name
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.expectedResult: Exactly one [data-test=product-card] renders, with [data-test=product-name-{id}] reading "Claw Hammer".

steps.action: Confirm no other cards are visible.
steps.expectedResult: Only the single exact-match card remains on screen.

tests.summary: Product Listing: search by partial keyword
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.expectedResult: Both "Claw Hammer" and "Thor Hammer" cards are shown (2 products); no non-matching product appears.
Every visible product name contains the substring "Hammer".

tests.summary: Product Listing: search with no results
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.action: Type "Cordless Drill" into [data-test=search-query] (a name not present in the catalog).
steps.expectedResult: Zero [data-test=product-card] elements render; an empty/no-results message is shown, no console error.

tests.summary: Product Listing: sort by price ascending
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.action: Select the ascending price option from [data-test=sort].
steps.expectedResult: Product cards reorder so [data-test=product-price] ascends top to bottom.

steps.action: Read [data-test=product-price] for the first 3 cards in order.
steps.expectedResult: Order is Safety Goggles ($5.50) -> Tape Measure ($8.25) -> Slip Joint Pliers ($9.17), matching ascending price across the full catalog.

tests.summary: Product Listing: combined category filter + search intersection
tests.precondition: Home page loaded, no filters applied.

steps.expectedResult: Only products that are BOTH Hand Tools AND match "Pliers" are shown: Combination Pliers and Slip Joint Pliers (2 products) - confirming intersection, not union.

steps.action: Check for "Bolt Cutters" and "Claw Hammer" (Hand Tools but not matching "Pliers").
steps.expectedResult: Neither appears in the filtered results.
